Name: Whitey
Description: Aelfyre Whitemane, dubbed Whitey, was a Kymellian xenologist who fell in love with Earth's culture. This was what moved him to try and stop James Power from creating an Anti-matter Device. A similar device had been used on Kymellia and had resulted in the destruction of the entire planet. Ignoring the Kymellian law of non-interference, Aelfyre travelled to Earth to stop Dr. Power’s experiment. He arrived only to find that the Z'nrx already had plans for the formula. (An anti-matter device had destroyed the Z'nrx home world as well). During this time he was mortally wounded.
